creator: kamila@ksp.sk
text:
This port currently does not build on FreeBSD 13 because of API changes in base. This seems to be fixed in py-libzfs upstream (see https://github.com/freenas/py-libzfs/commit/74cf19b6ff0e677574515265f11f2e58b22be425). Therefore, this port should be updated to a version that includes this commit.

Note that iocage depends on this, and thus iocage also does not build on FreeBSD 13. As quite a few people use iocage, I think the importance of this should be bumped.
